items.q: Name a major language associated with Brazil.
items.explanation: Portuguese is commonly associated with Brazil.

items.explanation: Italian is commonly associated with Italy.

items.a: A word with a similar meaning
options: A comparison using like or as
A clause that cannot stand alone as a sentence

items.q: Name a major language associated with France.
items.explanation: French is commonly associated with France.
